# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in this extension, the underlying
`@mnemoverse/mcp-memory-server` npm package, or any other Mnemoverse
product, please report it via one of these channels:

1. **Email** — [security@mnemoverse.com](mailto:security@mnemoverse.com)
2. **Private GitHub security advisory** —
   [github.com/mnemoverse/mnemoverse-vscode/security/advisories/new](https://github.com/mnemoverse/mnemoverse-vscode/security/advisories/new)

We acknowledge receipt within two business days and will work with you
on a coordinated disclosure timeline.

**Please do not open a public GitHub issue for vulnerabilities.** Public
issues are fine for bugs, feature requests, and questions, but security
reports must go through the private channels above.

## Coordinated disclosure policy

Full policy, PGP key, and acknowledgments:
[mnemoverse.com/.well-known/security.txt](https://mnemoverse.com/.well-known/security.txt)
(RFC 9116).
